'''chajaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:squandermaniac|squandermaniac]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-j-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:squandermaniac|squandermaniac]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chajaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæjæjæth|chæjæjæth]] || [[word:chæjæjæj|chæjæjæj]] || [[word:chæjæjæsh|chæjæjæsh]] || [[word:chæjæjæ|chæjæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chajajajath|chajajajath]] || [[word:chajajajaj|chajajajaj]] || [[word:chajajajash|chajajajash]] || [[word:chajajaja|chajajaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chajajath|chajajath]] || [[word:chajajaj|chajajaj]] || [[word:chajajash|chajajash]] || [[word:chajaja|chajaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chajafjath|chajafjath]] || [[word:chajafjaj|chajafjaj]] || [[word:chajafjash|chajafjash]] || [[word:chajafjaf|chajafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chajajatha|chajajatha]] || [[word:chajajaja|chajajaja]] || [[word:chajajasha|chajajasha]] || [[word:chajajaka|chajajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chajajath|chajajath]] || [[word:chajajaj|chajajaj]] || [[word:chajajash|chajajash]] || [[word:chajaja|chajaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chajajathal|chajajathal]] || [[word:chajajajal|chajajajal]] || [[word:chajajashal|chajajashal]] || [[word:chajajakal|chajajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chajajathatha|chajajathatha]] || [[word:chajajajaja|chajajajaja]] || [[word:chajajashasha|chajajashasha]] || [[word:chajajaka|chajajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chajajathan|chajajathan]] || [[word:chajajajan|chajajajan]] || [[word:chajajashan|chajajashan]] || [[word:chajajakan|chajajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chajajathaoro|chajajathaoro]] || [[word:chajajajaoro|chajajajaoro]] || [[word:chajajashaoro|chajajashaoro]] || [[word:chajajakaoro|chajajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
